'''Augusta I'att''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who co-founded [[I'att Armament]] with her husband, [[Strephan I'att|Strephan]] and was the grandmother to [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian]] and great-grandmother to [[Tam Azur-Jamin]] respectively.<ref name="TOT" />

==Biography==
In her later years Augusta contracted a rare degenerative condition incurable on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] which, without expensive treatment, was slowly killing her and made traveling impractical. As this was contrary to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Eisen Kerioth|Kerioth's]] plans to move the weapon developers to [[Doldur]] and hijack their technology, he had Augusta and Strephan executed.<ref name="TOT" />
